import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_last_element():
    result = find_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 7)
    expected = 4
    assert result == expected, f"Expected index {expected} for last element, got {result}"

def test_find_last_element_recursion_bug():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, target)
    assert result == 4, f"Expected index 4 for target {target} in array {arr}, got {result}"
